'''TK-104'''<ref name="JKTCG" /> was a [[Human/Legends|Human]]<ref name="CSWE" /> [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. At some point, TK-104 was present in a location with an [[Color/Legends|orange]] [[Atmosphere/Legends|sky]], alongside the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] and an airborne [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]], with both being reflected in the visor of TK-104's [[Stormtrooper armor/Legends|helmet]]. A loyal [[Trooper/Legends|trooper]], TK-104 was one of many stormtroopers who tried to stand out in service to [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] Vader in the hopes of receiving the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord's]] notice and favor.<ref name="JKTCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
TK-104 was created by a card for the [[Scum and Villainy (Jedi Knights TCG)|''Scum and Villainy'']] expansion set of [[Decipher]]'s [[2001]] ''[[Jedi Knights Trading Card Game]]''.<ref name="JKTCG" />
